risks.title: Unreviewed changes to security-critical file
risks.evidence: Multiple code modifications to src/screens/Security.tsx detected with high relevance scores (0.95, 0.85) but no evidence of security review or test execution
risks.recommendedAction: Immediately review the Security.tsx changes for security implications before deployment

risks.title: Duplicate event logging indicates monitoring degradation
risks.evidence: 4 events detected for same file modification within 17ms window; 3 tagged as duplicates with relevance spread 0.2-0.95
risks.recommendedAction: Investigate and fix event deduplication in code observer to reduce signal noise

opportunities.title: Establish mandatory security testing for sensitive files
opportunities.evidence: Security.tsx changes lack evidence of automated testing; file classification indicates security sensitivity
opportunities.suggestedAction: Configure CI/CD to automatically run security tests when src/screens/Security.tsx is modified

opportunities.title: Implement file-pattern-based code review gates
opportunities.evidence: Security file modifications should trigger mandatory review workflow but no evidence of enforcement
opportunities.suggestedAction: Add GitHub branch protection rules requiring security review for files matching security patterns

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx changes and verify impact
taskCandidates.description: Examine recent modifications to src/screens/Security.tsx to identify what was changed and assess security implications
taskCandidates.rationale: High-relevance security file modifications require immediate review before they reach production

taskCandidates.title: Run security test suite on modified file
taskCandidates.description: Execute security tests for src/screens/Security.tsx to validate changes don't introduce vulnerabilities
taskCandidates.rationale: No evidence of security testing; critical for security-sensitive frontend file

taskCandidates.title: Fix event deduplication in code observer
taskCandidates.description: Investigate why same file modification generates multiple events and implement deduplication logic
taskCandidates.rationale: Reduces monitoring noise and improves signal clarity for future analysis

recommendations.title: Add pre-commit hook for security files
recommendations.rationale: Prevent unvetted security code from being committed
recommendations.action: Configure husky/pre-commit to block commits modifying security files without test execution

recommendations.title: Implement temporal deduplication in event system
recommendations.rationale: Multiple identical events within milliseconds indicate logging redundancy
recommendations.action: Add deduplication logic to code-observer that merges events for same file within 100ms window

pendingApprovals.taskTitle: Review Security.tsx changes and verify impact
pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx changes and verify impact
